# Dataset Provenance Review Template

## Dataset metadata

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Dataset name |  |
| Version |  |
| Owner |  |
| Source |  |
| Date acquired |  |
| License / usage rights |  |
| Data classification |  |
| Intended use |  |
| Prohibited use |  |

## Source and lineage

| Question | Answer |
|---|---|
| Where did the data originate? |  |
| Was it collected internally or externally? |  |
| Was consent or lawful basis considered where relevant? |  |
| Has the data been transformed? |  |
| Are transformations versioned? |  |
| Can records be traced back to source? |  |
| Can records be deleted or corrected? |  |

## Access and integrity

| Control | Status | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Read access restricted |  |  |
| Write access restricted |  |  |
| Change logging enabled |  |  |
| Dataset version immutable |  |  |
| Integrity/hash recorded |  |  |
| Data quality checks present |  |  |
| Poisoning/anomaly checks present |  |  |

## Sensitive data review

| Question | Answer |
|---|---|
| Does the dataset include personal data? |  |
| Does it include secrets or credentials? |  |
| Does it include customer data? |  |
| Does it include internal incident/security data? |  |
| Is redaction/minimization applied? |  |
| Are retention limits defined? |  |

| Decision | Selected |
|---|---|
| Approved for experiment only |  |

| Approved for production model training |  |
| Not approved |  |
